questions.desc: The instructions were clear enough to understand how to make minimal changes while reaching at least 2% change.
It was difficult to use the brush, eraser, and undo annotations.
I am confident that my annotations capture the essential differences between two symbols.
Please select 'Strongly disagree' to confirm that you're paying attention.
Did you follow a specific annotation strategy?
If you followed a specific annotation strategy: How did you decide which features to highlight or erase? (optional)
Did the 2% minimal-change requirement affect your annotation strategy?
If the 2% minimal-change requirement affected your annotation strategy, how did it do that? (optional)
Is there anything else you'd like to share about your experience or about how we can improve the tool? (optional)
